home.heroLead: Warm cups. Clean finishes. Long aftertaste.
home.unseatedHint: To order and follow your tray, please scan the QR at your table. For a quiet preview of the room, you may still browse the menu.
home.signatureSub: Balanced sweetness. Clean structure. Long finish.
home.categoriesHint: Choose a direction. We'll keep it simple.

tableNotice.browseOnlyNote: You may browse the menu, but you need to scan the table QR to place an order.

duckPost.deskTitle: We will name one cup for this table.
duckPost.deskHint: Unhurried. One pour. No menu yet.
duckPost.deskNudge: Unhurried — one cup, chosen for this table.
duckPost.r1Dim: The mail duck is crossing the sky…
duckPost.r1Letter: A letter drops — listen for the landing.
duckPost.r1Open: The fold opens toward your table.
duckPost.r2Dim: Another pass — the duck circles once more.
duckPost.r2Letter: A second envelope drops, lighter this time.
duckPost.r2Open: Paper argues gently; we keep the quieter truth.
duckPost.r3Dim: Last delivery — slower wings, surer hands.
duckPost.r3Letter: If doubt lingers, the room votes with warmth, not noise.
duckPost.r3Open: What remains is the line that would not leave the margin.
duckPost.blockedTitle: Oh no — the duck is out of letters.
duckPost.blockedBody: This round has used every reroll. The house stands by the last pour.
duckPost.blockedOwner: The house keeps the final recommendation.
duckPost.blockedDismissHint: Swipe down on this card once, tap the dimmed edge, or press Escape.

tasting.support: From your choices, Annap is finding a cup that fits this note.

flavor.question: What should lead in the cup?

sommelier.whisper1: Take your time — there is no wrong answer.
sommelier.whisper2: We are listening for texture, not labels.
sommelier.whisper3: Sweetness is a mood, not a setting.
sommelier.whisper4: Lift can be quiet or decisive.

host.roomDefault: The room is slowing down tonight.

room.afternoon: The afternoon light is soft through the garden.
room.evening: The room is slowing down tonight.

host.deskSub: 106/1 Nguyễn Thị Minh Khai — we'll read the room before we pour.
host.eveningPrompt: What feeling should your cup carry today?
host.loading: One moment — I'm at the bar.
host.revealLine: I think I know what belongs at this table.
host.reroll: Would you like me to reconsider?
host.rerollBlockedBody: I'll stand by the last cup I named for your table.
host.ritualErr: Something interrupted us — try once more.
host.emptyCup: Not quite right — give me another moment.
host.wait1: The bar goes quiet for a moment…
host.wait3: I'm choosing one cup for your table.
host.wait5: The room is still — no rush.
host.wait6: I want the quieter truth tonight.
host.wait7: One last read of the evening…
host.wait8: Nguyễn Thị Minh Khai is hushed tonight.
host.wait9: This is the cup I'd stand behind.

ritual.finalPause: Để mình nghĩ thêm một chút…

deepen.2: Mình hiểu thêm một chút rồi…

eveningAck.slow_evening: Vậy mình sẽ giữ tối nay nhẹ lại.
eveningAck.bright_lift: Sáng hơn một chút — mình nghe thấy.
eveningAck.creamy_calm: Mềm và không vội — hiểu rồi.

ack.q1_alert: Alert and present — I hear you.
ack.q1_refresh: Sounds like an evening that wants a little brightness.
ack.q1_curious: A touch curious — I've noted that.
ack.q2_coffee: Coffee — I'm beginning to see the direction.
ack.q2_tea: Tea will be softer for tonight.
ack.q2_signature: A house signature — I've noted it.

menu.browseIntro: Each cup is curated for this room — scroll unhurriedly; the bar reads your pace.
menu.categorySeasonalNote: Seasonal rotation. Ask the barista for today's microlot.
menu.backHomeAria: Return to the home screen to pick one of the three paths
menu.editorialDefault: Curated for this season—choose slowly; the bar follows your pace.
menu.editorialSignature: The cups we name aloud—steady, confident, unmistakably ours.
menu.editorialMilk: Comforting milk-forward cups for unhurried sips and long tables.
menu.editorialBlack: Bright structure, quiet clarity—cups that reward a slower read.
menu.editorialTea: Leaves and stone-ground calm—soft caffeine, clean finish.
menu.editorialSpark: Lifted, aromatic, and brisk—when you want the room to widen.
menu.editorialSeasonal: A short letter from the season—here for a window, then folded away.
menu.editorialFallback: Curated for this chapter of the menu—ask the barista if two cups call equally.

houseSelection.rerollSealed: The house stands by this recommendation — too many changes spoil the ritual.
houseSelection.rerollWait: Give the ink a breath before another pass.
houseSelection.rerollBlocked: The house stands by this recommendation.
houseSelection.afterAdd: When it lands, ask what would follow nicely — a slower cup or something from the pastry page.

letterRoom.earnedKicker: The house names this cup for you.

track.errSoft: A quiet moment—connection is soft. We'll try again shortly.

ritual.heading: Arrive by feeling; we'll meet you in the room.
ritual.intro: Moods are doorways—not switches. Your host reads the air, sets the tray in kind, and lets language settle the way a private tasting does: unhurried, editorial, never a catalogue.
ritual.shroudBody: Setting the room and drawing language from tonight's parchment—no prompts, no chatter.
ritual.otherDirectionsHint: Should you wish another line on the tray.
ritual.catalogErr: The parchment did not reach us; the tasting will return when the room steadies.
ritual.catalogOffline: The room is quiet — we are holding yesterday's list until the line steadies.
ritual.sommelierFallbackOpen: The letter did not arrive—but the room still holds you. The cups at right were set to echo how you entered.
ritual.sommelierFallbackTasting: Choose the line that speaks first; your host will return when the connection steadies.
ritual.sommelierFallbackReason: We keep the tray composed until the line returns.
ritual.sommelierDefaultOpening: We take a breath, then offer {name}—drawn from tonight's list with the same care as the bar.
ritual.readingRite1: Interpreting your palate in this light…
ritual.readingRite3: Setting cups beside the mood you chose…
ritual.pairingEcho: A natural echo of your mood
ritual.pairingLine: Still on your line — worth reading
ritual.pairingNeighbor: A softer neighbor on the tray

bright.title: Bright & citrusy
bright.line: Sunlit acidity, clean glass, a little electricity.
bright.caption: Morning through glass—lifted, legible, almost audible.
bright.tastingDirection: We tilt the room toward light: citrus oils on porcelain, a cool rim, electricity held politely.
bright.prompt: bright citrusy lifted crystalline yuzu refreshing luminous
bright.glimpse: You seem drawn to clarity and lift — cups that ring clean rather than sit heavy.

slow.title: Slow & comforting
slow.line: Round sweetness, hush, something to linger inside.
slow.caption: Weight you can lean into; sweetness that doesn't hurry.
slow.tastingDirection: We let the air thicken gently—roundness, hush, the kind of warmth that gathers instead of announces.
slow.prompt: slow comforting warm cozy sweet gentle velvet round
slow.glimpse: A slower, softer arc suits you today — sweetness that stays in the room after the sip.

floral.title: Floral & delicate
floral.line: Perfumed air, whispered sugar, porcelain calm.
floral.caption: Perfume first, sugar in a whisper.
floral.tastingDirection: We draw the curtain toward petals and cool linen—soft lift, porcelain stillness, a finish that lingers kindly.
floral.prompt: floral delicate jasmine honeysuckle blossom perfume
floral.glimpse: Delicacy reads as your line — perfume held in restraint, not decoration.

adventurous.title: Adventurous
adventurous.line: Layers that shift; spice, shadow, and return.
adventurous.caption: Spice, fruit, shadow—cups that change their mind mid-sip.
adventurous.tastingDirection: We invite a braver silhouette—layers that trade places, a little theatre without raising the voice.
adventurous.prompt: adventurous bold daring spice unexpected layered
adventurous.glimpse: You leave room for a turn in the cup — structure, then something unscripted.

focus.title: Quiet focus
focus.line: Tea-like clarity for reading, thinking, or rain.
focus.caption: Tea-like clarity for concentration, rain, or both.
focus.tastingDirection: We compose for still minds—transparent lines, rain on glass, room for thought between sips.
focus.prompt: quiet focus contemplative tea clean transparent filter pen
focus.glimpse: Stillness and transparency matter — a pour for reading the page as much as the flavor.

softer.label: Softer texture
softer.snippet: guest whispers for a softer, rounder mouthfeel—velvet, less edge, hush between sips

brighter.label: Brighter acidity
brighter.snippet: guest asks the line to lift—brighter acidity, air, glass-bright clarity

less_sweet.label: Drier finish
less_sweet.snippet: guest prefers a drier arc—restrained sweetness, transparent finish

more_adventurous.label: Push further
more_adventurous.snippet: guest invites the tray to wander further—bolder layers, curiosity, shadow

low_caffeine.label: Lower caffeine
low_caffeine.snippet: guest wishes a gentler arc of caffeine—soft evening, steady hand
